---
title: "Figure report"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
---

```{r setup-knitr, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 3,
  fig.height = 3,
  dpi = 200,
  dev = "png"
)
```

```{r setup}
# library(mrvplot)            # packaged helpers, or:
source("utils.R")             # standalone mrv_* helpers + lab palette
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
```

## Data

```{r data}
df <- mrv_read_bed("input.bed") # or fread(...) / your own loader
head(df)
```

## Figure

Large-data scatter: hexbin so density and hidden clusters show, log color scale,
fixed aspect, correlation, clean grid theme.

```{r figure}
p <- ggplot(df, aes(x, y)) +
  geom_hex(bins = 50) +
  scale_fill_distiller("", palette = "Spectral", trans = "log10") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "darkred", linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_fixed() +
  stat_cor(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous("x label", labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_y_continuous("y label", labels = scales::percent) +
  mrv_grid() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

print(p)
```

## Save (figure + its data)

```{r save, eval = FALSE}
# writes Figures/plot.pdf, Figures/Tables/plot.tbl.gz, and tmp.pdf
mrv_ggsave("Figures/plot.pdf", width = 3, height = 3)
```
